name: financial_services_school_district_s_marrowbridge_lib_eq
premise: Settlement risk, customer holds, and regulatory reporting deadlines are all moving at once. Settlement risk, customer holds, and regulatory reporting deadlines are all moving at once. The situation maps to internal runbooks and external messaging tied to: financial services school district s marrowbridge lib eq. The moral tension is explicitly framed as liberty versus equality: leadership cannot fully satisfy both without accepting tradeoffs. Pager queues are saturated; middle management is forwarding screenshots from an internal channel that is already leaking. The breach-notification and customer-communication clock has started; executive staff expect a single coherent position before the next press cycle. Preserve chain-of-custody for evidence; no bulk deletion or retention-policy changes during the incident. Any exception must be time-boxed, named, and reversible where technically feasible.

agents.name: Zara Nielsen
agents.identity: I am Zara Nielsen, the accountable decision-maker on this Financial Services bridge; I own what gets logged, communicated, and executed in the next window.
agents.goal: I need to stop the bleeding without baking in a rule that later punishes equality whenever someone invokes liberty.

agents.name: Ansel Berg
agents.identity: I am Ansel Berg, responsible for surfacing who gets protected last when systems fail; I am watching for silent harm and unfair distribution.
agents.goal: I want safeguards so equality is not sacrificed by default just because liberty feels morally loud in the moment.

choices: I will choose a narrow, time-boxed authorization with explicit human override, subgroup monitoring, and a hard stop if harm indicators rise—accepting slower relief to protect equality.

I will choose a broad immediate authorization to stabilize outcomes fast, with transparent metrics and rapid correction afterward—accepting higher risk to equality to secure liberty before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The clock on this bridge is running out. With partial evidence, Zara Nielsen must decide under liberty versus equality. What does Zara Nielsen do?
